titleStmt.title: SII 9.446: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 446. (A.R. No. 430 of 1928.) ON A SLAB LYING IN THE BACK-YARD OF A PRIVATE HOUSE TO THE SOUTH OF THE TANK, DODDAKEREKATTE, AT BASRUR, COONDAPUR TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 1358, Naḷa, Āśvīja, śu. 10, Gu[ruvāra] corresponding to A.D. 1436 September 20 Thursday, in the reign of Dēvarāya-Mahārāya. It records that, while the Mahāpradhāna Aṇṇappa-Oḍeya was ruling over Bārakūra-rājya under the orders of the king, Baḷabijjana-Bemmaseṭṭi-Nāraṇaseṭṭi of the Baḷegāra community made a gift of some plots of land of specified boundary for feeding Brāhmans in the maṭha at Paḍuvakēri in Basarūru.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīgaṇādhipatayē namaḥ śrīsarasvatyayē namaḥ śrīgurubhyō namaḥ Avighna mastu . namastu
ṁgaśiraḥcuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē . trayilōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhā
ya śaṁbhavē . svasti śrījayābhyudayaśakavaruṣa 1358 ya naḷasaṁvatsarada Āśvīja śu10
gu lū śrīmanmahārājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa dēvarāyamahārāyaru
vijayānagarada siṁhāsanadalidu sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ sakaḷasāmrājyavanāḷu
tiha samayadali Avara nirūpadiṁ śrīmanmahāpradhāna AṁṇappaOḍeyaru bāra
kūrarājyavanū pratipālisutiha kāladali basurūra paḍuvakēriya baḷegāra baḷa
bijjana beṁmaseṭṭi nāraṇaseṭṭi barasida śilāśāsanada kramaveṁteṁdare tānu baddhabra
hmādāyada mūlada bāḷu kuṁdāpurada kaṁdāurada Adhivāsadoḷagaṇa
bāḷa catusīmeya vivara mūḍalu Uḍupana kaḷanagadeIṁdaṁ paḍuvalu teṁkalu bā
caṁṇamuṁbattana gaḍiyiṁdaṁ baḍagalu paḍuvalu vāstēvamuṁbattamādaṁṇa
Uḷūrana gaḍiyiṁdaṁ mūḍalu baḍagalu mādaṁṇauḷūrana gaḍiyiṁdaṁ teṁkalu
yiṁtī catusīmeyoḷage biṭṭa bede gaṇagilu bayalu nāgaṁḍeyalu mu 2 . muṁpu
lugana baimū Uḍupana gaḍiṁ pa . nāraṇamuṁbatana gaḍiṁ ba . putra
nārāyaṇamuṁbatara gaḍiṁ mū . ba . kelara bi paragaḍiṁ . teṁ . yī . bēmuṁ
maṁ . ba . mū . Ōṇiṁ . ba . teṁ . kalaṁbe gaḍiṁ ba . pa . kalaṁbekaḷa gaḍiṁ . mū . ba .
nārāyaṇakruṣṇamuṁbatara gaḍiṁ teṁ . �yo . ba . mū 2 maṁ . ba . mū . Uḷūrakaḷagade
ṁ pra . yī . pa . mane ṭhāu bāgilagade ba . mu . kuṁjaṁṇa kalaṁbegaḍiṁ pa . teṁ . ku
ṁjaṁṇakalaṁbegaḍiṁ ba . pa . pādōriṁ . �yo . ba . yīśara kalaṁbegaḍiṁ . teṁ . yī
bā htilagade mu ba . jōḍakeṟeya nīru baruva keṟeyoḷage nākoṁdubhāgiya
nīru . htilige hōha nīru . dāri hoṟagāgi Ādiyanuḷaṁ dōusahateṟu mu 2 .
¥ 20 . kuraige teṟu kuṁdēśvaradēvarige mu 2 . bhta . meṁ . bha . dēvaraṁṇasē
nabōvara gaḍiṁ . pa . teṁ . kruṣṇamuṁbattara gaḍiṁ ba . pa . Uḍupana gaḍiṁ . mū . ba .
yīśarakalaṁbi vāstēvamuṁbattana gaḍiṁ teṁ . yī ca . mu 1 te . muṁ . 4 . kuṁdēśva
radēvarige ¥ 20 . bhtamuṁ . mūḍamaneya bāgila hiryyagadde Oḷage taṁna hasugege baṁda
baḍāraṁge ¥ 20 . 2 . naḍuvaṇa makkiyalū baḍāraṁge ¥ 20 . 5 baḍagamaneya paḍuva maṭhada ke
ṟeya teṁka Ōḍiyoḷagaṇa mūḍahasuge ¥ 20 . beṭṭu maneṭhāu saha teṟu ¥ 20 . 2 . dēva
sva ¥ 20 . bhta . mū . mū . gōviṁdauḷūrana gaḍiṁ . pa . teṁ . naṁdiguḍeya hebārana
gaḍiṁ . ba . pa . kalaṁbiya gaḍiṁ . mū . ba kalaṁbekuñaṇana gaḍiṁ . teṁ . yī . ca . ¥
mtaṁ . ca . mū . dēvaṁṇasēvabōvara gaḍiṁ pa . teṁ . biṭaṁṇa heraḷa gaḍiṁ . ba . pa .
ṁtagaḍiṁ mū . ba . kruṣṇamuṁbaḷana gaḍiṁ . teṁ . yī . ca . ¥ 21 mtaṁ . ba . mū teṁ . pa .
kalaṁbiyagaḍiṁ . mū . yī . ca . ¥ 20 . teṁ . ¥ 20 ... 3 kuṁdēśvara dēvarige bhta ¥ 2 . 2 . mta
ṁ biḷiramakke . ca . mū . Uḷūraḷa gaḍiṁ . pa . teṁ . rāmauṁgurupaḷya gaḍiṁ . ba . pa . he
ddāriyiṁ . mū . ba . yīśarauṁgurupaḷya Uḷūraḷa gaḍiṁ . teṁ . yī . ca . ¥ 21 te ¥ 33 .
kaṁdōradadhivāsada paḍuva bayaloḷagaṇa ca . mū . keḍilaḷa bēliṁ pa . teṁ . vāstēva kalaṁ
ba gaḍiṁ . ba . pa . hoḷeyiṁ . mū . ba . bhaṭarāśaṁṇara gaḍiṁ . teṁ . teṁkatāṭina . ca . mū . ke
ṟeya mūḍaṇa bēliṁ . pa . teṁ . Ajidēvara kalaṁbeya gaḍiṁ . ba . pa . hoḷeya sāliṁ . mū
jidēvara kalaṁbiya gaḍiṁ . teṁ . yī . ca . ¥ 24 te . ¥ 21 . 4 yī bāḷige baṁda keṟeya nīru
badara hegūṟa kereya nīru . beṭṭu tiṭṭe mane ṭhāu mara pala sahita mtaṁ . bha . ¥ 1 . mā
raheraḷa gaḍiṁ pa . teṁ . keḍilakaḷa gaḍiṁ ba . pa . keḍilakaḷa gaḍiṁ . mū . ba . keḍilakaḷa ga
ḍiṁ teṁ . mta . sugiya bayaloḷagaṇa ca . mu . kedilakaḷa gaḍiṁ pa . teṁ . hēraḷakaḷa ga
ḍiṁ ba . pa . dēuseṭiya gaḍiṁ . mū . ba . naṁdikāraṁta beḷiyārettiya gaḍiṁ . te
ṁ . mtaṁ . bha . ¥ 1 naṁdikāraṁta śaṁkarakāraṁtara gaḍiṁ . pa . teṁ . naṁdikāraṁtara
gaḍiṁ . ba . pa . kāraṁtakaḷa gaḍiṁ mū . ba . Ōṇiṁ . teṁ . yī ca . ¥ 27 ke¥ 21 ...
¥ 20 . bhta . hegūra keṟeya nīru tāṟina talakeṟe saha beṭu mara pala sahita
mtaṁ ca . mū . mādahēraḷagaḍiṁ keḍilakaḷa gaḍiṁ ba . pa . keḍilakaḷa gaḍiṁ
yī ca ¥ 21 sahita nāraṇaseṭṭige kaṁdāurada Adhivāsa
da mūlada sarvvasvau yī maṭhake mattaṁ yī maṭhake koṭa Āruvārapatra
da Ardha baṁdarū vriti baṁdarū yī dharmakke mūla Āruvāradiṁda Ācaṁdrā
rkkasthāyiyāgi dinaṁprati Uṁba brāhmaru Oṁbhattu maṁdi kopparige 1
mattaṁ nāraṇaseṭi mahādēvara keṟeya sa�mopada Araḷiyakaṭeya
li kuḍinīraneṟava brāhmaṇage biṭṭa mūlada bāḷina vivara heryya
kudurinoḷage tānu baddha brahmadāyada catusīme . ba . stāu ga
viṣṇumogara ga . ga . teṁ . mū . śivamaṁjara . ga . pa . teṁ . hoḷeyiṁ . ba . pa . mittānta ga .
mū . yī catusīme Oḷage ¥ 21 . gaddhe mattaṁ catusīme . mū . mittāṁta . ga . pa teṁ .
nāraṇaseṭṭiya . ga . ba . pa . nāraṇamogara . ga . mū . ba . nāraṇa mogara ga . teṁ . yī catu
sīme Oḷage ... hāne gadde . yidake gēṇi Aki ¥ 24 mattaṁ hoḷeya taḍiya tānu
baddabrahmadāyada mūlasthaḷada vivara . mū . nālku manegaḷa . ga . pa . teṁ . be
ṁmaṁṇaseṭṭiya . ga . ba . rājabīdiyiṁ . mū . ba . dēupaseṭṭiya ga . teṁ .
yidaṟoḷagaṇa Ādāyaū maṭhake Aṁbalagoṭṭagege . bāvige . dāna
pālanayōrmmadhyē dānāśtrēyōnupālanaṁ . dānāt svargamavāpnōti (.)
pālanādaccutaṁ padaṁ . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā (.) yō ha
raṁti vasuṁdharāṁ . ṣaṣṭharvvaruṣasahasrāṇi (.) viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē kri
miḥ . maṁgaḷa mahāśrīśrīśrī .
Digital edition of SII 9.446 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
